title: New Guy with a thought
wikitext:
[]: New Guy with a thought...             Quote Post by Wake » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:22 am Yeah thank Adult Swim for me, but thankfully for you guys I figured out a lot on my own and read up on it first. One of my only questions is this (and I haven't seen it asked anywhere): What is the significance of the appearance and disappearance of Rei in Ep 01 when she's supposedly in the hospital and End of Evangelion? I know that she's Lilith in some sense in EoE but that doesn't really explain it in Ep 1 of the series. Is she watching over Shinji even before he's met Rei? I dunno maybe I'm missing something here.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 7:11 am It's got something to do with Quantum Physics. The significance I really can't tell. The riddle does run across my mind many times, and this scene also happened at the end of EoE, when Rei was supposed to be already dead. Maybe some experienced members can tell us what's that about?

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Mon Jul 17, 2006 7:47 am It was just Anno playing games with our minds, imo. It's incredibly possible that Shinji didn't actually see Rei in the first episode, as he doesn't comment on it later on when he sees her again, with bandages.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon Jul 17, 2006 8:11 am i'm afraid this conversation HAS happened here....somewhere. a quick forum search should bring it up.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 17, 2006 8:20 am tinmeigut wrote: It's got something to do with Quantum Physics.

[]:             Quote Post by captainhaddock » Mon Jul 17, 2006 9:20 am A wizard did it.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 17, 2006 9:29 am captainhaddock wrote: A wizard did it.

[]: Re: New Guy with a thought...             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 17, 2006 10:17 am Wake wrote: What is the significance of the appearance and disappearance of Rei in Ep 01 when she's supposedly in the hospital and End of Evangelion? I know that she's Lilith in some sense in EoE but that doesn't really explain it in Ep 1 of the series. Is she watching over Shinji even before he's met Rei? I dunno maybe I'm missing something here.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Jul 17, 2006 11:25 am Copy-pasta from the Ep01 Commentary : (cut #022) Shin-seiki wrote: The Episode Commentary for #01 that comes with Platinum Vol.01 (which is translated from the original that was included with Renewal) has this to say about this cut: When Shinji comes to New Tokyo 3, he sees a girl that seems to be Rei Ayanami for just an instant. Considering how she is injured and wrapped up in bandages, when he later meets her in NERV Headquarters, the natural assumption would be that this was a phantom vision. But in Episode 26', "My True Heart For You," a different possibility is suggested. The girl that appeared for just one cut in this scene may be the Rei Ayanami who is "the existence that gazes upon man."

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 17, 2006 12:09 pm This of the pahntom Rei's like bookends Shinji sees them at the beginning of the series and again at the end of EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 17, 2006 1:24 pm For some reason, when Rei 1 shows up at the Command Center to give Naoko a big emotional bitchslap, she reminds me strangely of Bookend Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Jul 17, 2006 2:10 pm Reichu wrote: For some reason, when Rei 1 shows up at the Command Center to give Naoko a big emotional bitchslap, she reminds me strangely of Bookend Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:04 pm Legend of the Past wrote: Hey, good find. Probably another mirrored scene, not unlike with Shinji's hand, and him starting awake, and the thousand other instances that are recycled.

[]: Mystery Rei             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 22, 2006 4:27 pm This is something that confused the hell out of me, too, so I'm gonna post the screencaps about it and maybe we can get to the bottom of this together. What drives me nuts is how my platinum book says something about this Rei being "the one who watches over mankind" or something to that affect, and I don't understand WHERE they got that from! NOBODY says a quote like that in the film! *twitches* Stupid confusing yet compelling Eva....*ahem* The first time we see her: Is this Rei III, "Ayanami" herself, or is it her mystery counterpart again? The mystery Rei again: But is this pic meant to come back full circle to episode 1, or is it Rei (Rei III) herself? Is it possible this Rei could have something to do with Lilith, ie: be a clone solely from her, or would that make her a full Angel then?

[]: Re: Mystery Rei             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 22, 2006 4:46 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Is this Rei III, "Ayanami" herself, or is it her mystery counterpart again?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 22, 2006 5:21 pm Thanks for clearing that up, Tines-san. I was wondering about how exactly Yui and Lilith fit in with Rei. (I knew that Rei was/is a clone of Yui and Lilith, I just didn't understand the specifics of it.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 22, 2006 5:25 pm I don't think there is a firm answer on the Yui/Lilith thing. Rei I is definitely composed of whatever material was salvaged from the Contact Experiment, but the later models may well share only the form of Yui (as graphically shown in Fuyutsuki's subsumption). Rei III's deciduous arm, and both Rei II and Rei III's medications hint that she might be made of Lilith-stuff in those iterations.
